text:
Rong-En Fan wrote:
> On Mon, Aug 18, 2008 at 03:34:29PM +0200, Marcin Cieslak wrote:

>> I have notified the original author via email and she promised to 
>> publish the distfiles somewhere on sourceforge soon.
>>
>> Can we push the EXPIRATION_DATE a little bit?
> 
> How long would you like to extend?

I don't know, I think end of September is reasonable. At least until 
September I will have some time to test and fix the port.
I don't think anything will be released in August...

-- 
               << Marcin Cieslak // saper@system.pl >>
